hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Lake Villa 4bhk in Lonavala offers a spacious villa with two bedrooms and four bathrooms. The property includes a living room and family rooms, ensuring comfort for all guests.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can enjoy a year-round outdoor swimming pool, a terrace, and a garden. Free WiFi is available throughout the villa, enhancing the stay experience.
Convenient Facilities: The villa features air-conditioning, a kitchenette, balcony, and a private pool. Additional amenities include a badminton equipment hire and an electric vehicle charging station.
Nearby Attractions: Located 70 km from Pune International Airport, the villa is close to Lonavala Railway Station (4.8 km), Kune Falls (8 km), Bhushi Dam (10 km), and Adlabs Imagica (26 km).
